sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: Adorn thy bridal chamber, O Sion, and receive Christ the King: He whom the Virgin conceived and bore, she also worshipped.

sections.name: Lectio2
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio2:s/-5/-4/ s/She.*//s

sections.name: Lectio3
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio2:2-7 s/1-/4-/ s/1 .*She/4 She/s

sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. We have received Thy mercy, O God, in the midst of Thy temple; according to Thy Name, O God, so also is Thy praise unto the ends of the earth;
* Thy right hand is full of justice.
V. Let mount Sion rejoice, and the daughters of Juda be glad; because of thy judgments, O Lord.
R. Thy right hand is full of justice.

sections.name: Lectio5
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio4:s/As soon .*//s

sections.name: Lectio6
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio4:s/.* As soon /As soon /s s/$/~/
@Sancti/02-02:Lectio5:s/It had .*//s

sections.name: Lectio7
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio5:s/.* It had /It had /s s/$/~/
@Sancti/02-02:Lectio6:s/And now .*//s

sections.name: Lectio8
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio6:s/.* And now /And now /s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. Now Thou dost dismiss Thy servant, O Lord, according to Thy word in peace;
* Because my eyes have seen Thy salvation.
V. A light to the revelation of the Gentiles, and the glory of Thy people Israel.
R. Because my eyes have seen Thy salvation.

sections.name: Lectio9
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio7:s/A virgin .*//s

sections.name: Lectio10
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio7:s/.* A virgin /A virgin /s
@Sancti/02-02:Lectio8:s/Then .*//s

sections.name: Lectio11
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio8:s/.* Then /Then /s:Lectio8:s/Behold .*//s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. Today the Virgin Mary presented the child Jesus in the temple, and the righteous Simeon received him in his hands;
* And the widow Anna announced that the Messiah had come to the earth.
V. When his parents brought the child into the temple, Simeon took him up in his arms.
R. And the widow Anna announced that the Messiah had come to the earth.

sections.name: Lectio12
lines: @Sancti/02-02:Lectio8:s/.* Behold /Behold /s
